history.summary: fixed 数据 / 知识图谱 chart text legibility on the BDFZ light parchment palette by reading text colors from CSS variables and adding stroke halos to subject and node labels; rebuilt 实虚词典 page with a multi-color light theme — rose / amber / sage / teal panel washes replace the all-black gradient, with widened panel scrollbars plus a fade-out gradient and animated 向下滑动 pill so readers see when 馆藏辞典原页 / 教育部修订本 / 教育部成语典 lists are scrollable; removed BETA badges from 高中 / 初中 search and 词典 pages

hardened search-result subject switching by using a single guarded KaTeX render path for OCR formulas, escaping snippets/formula attributes before HTML insertion, and suppressing missing local favicon 404 noise

fixed '暂无页图' for 17 supplemental books (物理/化学/生物学/英语) by adding missing entries to book_map.json — all 27 supported supplemental books now have page-image mappings, added BDFZ ecosystem navigation widget (bdfz-nav.js) to all 4 HTML pages

restored high-school geography 人教版 textbook+atlas page-image mappings for the 10 supplemental books already present on R2/CDN, aligned the release ledger for this mapping-only rollout, and updated deployment notes around clean-checkout deploys and VPS SSH verification

integrated MOE idiom dictionary (5489 entries) for both 初中/高中 dict pages, added simplified↔traditional Chinese conversion (opencc) so simplified queries match MOE traditional-only entries, structured idiom display with sections (释义/典故/典源/注解/语义/例句/书证/近反义), fixed _x000D_ XML artifacts in idiom content, enhanced AI chat context with MOE revised + idiom evidence

初中 data quality fixes: corrected page offsets for 14 初中 books, rebuilt derived concept/keyword/graph tables with phase-aware data (初中 980 concepts + 335 keywords), fixed dict/chat AI 500 error (Query object SQLite binding bug), uploaded 初中 inline content images to R2, trending phase isolation to prevent 高中 terms in 初中 results

added junior high (初中) support: 48 textbooks across 9 subjects, phase-aware API/search/AI chat, chuzhong.html/chuzhong-dict.html pages, deploy chain hardening with git HEAD verification and post-deploy version check
restored the full current frontend release source, refreshed page-image mapping delivery, and repaired the accidental runtime-based production rollback
bundled yearly gaokao full-text payloads into the exam runtime datasets, synchronized the deployed dictionary reports, and finalized the image-first xuci/shici release state

added exam-mode xuci/shici views with year-expanded gaokao context, textbook and dictionary original-image evidence, a read-only MOE revised dictionary panel, and temporarily disabled OCR-derived xuci detail UI pending manual correction
aligned the public release to the supported textbook scope, attached page-image products to all 27 supported supplemental books, and prepared the verified 2843-row supplemental vector rollout
restricted the public textbook scope to 人教版 plus 英语北师大版 and 化学鲁科版, generated page-image products for 27 supported supplemental books, and rebuilt the 2843-page supplemental search/vector corpus

tightened textbook identity reconciliation at the data layer, removed primary-bound duplicate pages from the runtime supplemental corpus, and rebuilt the verified 15185-page supplemental vector release
verified textbook editions at the identity layer, merged same-edition supplemental duplicates back into the correct primary books, and refreshed cache markers for the corrected 187-book catalog
clarified supplemental-only search results that have OCR text but no page-image mapping, and aligned deploy guards so docs-only pushes no longer trigger production releases
aligned frontend versioning with the corrected supplemental textbook rollout, including the expanded visible book catalog and supplemental vector-backed retrieval release
distinguished exact, full-text, vector, and supplemental search traces in the UI and refreshed cache markers for the hybrid rerank search rollout
made precision-mode AI wait for the backend agent path first and only fall back to browser-direct generation if the server chat request fails
gave precision-agent searches a longer server-first window so definition queries prefer backend reranker results before falling back to browser-direct AI

enabled precision-agent textbook AI by default for definition-style queries, refreshed the AI panel copy, filtered noisy fallback term chips, and aligned frontend cache/version markers for reranker rollout
filtered synthetic trending queries, switched English analytics and subject graph to English-only terms, improved heatmap contrast, and refreshed runtime documentation counters
refined gaokao textbook anchors for parallel textbook editions so version-labeled refs resolve to the correct book and new chemistry/english additions can share precomputed links cleanly
added Luko chemistry and Beishida English textbook editions in parallel, version-labeled textbook titles across the site, and rebuilt page maps plus retrieval indexes for the expanded corpus
textbook classics now use curated page manifests, dictionary views show book page plus PDF page, and xuci single-character lookups prefer verified stroke-index anchors
search chat now launches browser fallback after an 8-second server head-start and tries workers.dev if the custom domain stalls; KaTeX warnings are silenced
AI chat now gives the server path a longer timeout and one retry before browser fallback; footer version text no longer appends the date
AI chat now pins the stable worker model, handles gateway HTML failures safely, removes recent searches, and folds feedback links into the footer
search related concepts now aggregate recognized matched_concepts instead of broken 2-4 character fragments
tightened graph search around local high-signal chunk evidence and simplified the About page to open-source feedback only
rewrote the About page around live runtime stats, operations boundaries, and current deployment flow
AI chat now uses precomputed gaokao analysis and textbook summaries; gaokao link panels prioritize precomputed refs before live retrieval
AI chat now expands retrieval with synonym aliases and relation hints; graph edges expose AI relation labels in tooltips
AI gateway clarified to use Worker custom domain ai.bdfz.net bound to service apis/production; docs and defaults aligned
multi-turn chat term routing, browser-fallback AI telemetry, search counts aligned to visible results
server-side grounded chat orchestration, evidence-first result badges, live stats-driven gaokao/about UI, richer gaokao AI analysis
9-page viewer window, dual-channel tags + confidence/path, AI memory chat, issue feedback entry, footer versioning
